value.0: A seemingly harmless widdle of wood, the essense within this bow comes to life in the hands of those truely in touch with the forces of nature.
A seemingly harmless widdle of wood, the essense within this bow comes to life in the hands of those truely in touch with the forces of nature.

This is a magical amulet. When worn it changes the Summon Creature IX spell, and allows the summoning a 3 more powerful summon, which is at random. This amulet can summon:

-Trolloc Seer
-Umber Hulk Shaman
-Kobold Renegade

The Wilds:
The wildlands of Middle Earth hold many strange creatures and monsters. This amulet allows the summoning a very rare species. These are even rare to come across in the wildlands.
Fashioned from rough iron, these bars extend into a narrow slot in the floor.
